post_text: The most asked tarot question is some version of when will it happen? After forty years of reading, the miss is often not technique. It is the question itself. Tarot reads conditions, momentum and threshold proximity. It is not a calendar. Read the full article: https://www.tidesofknowing.com/articles/rethinking-timing/ #TarotMethodology #SymbolicLiteracy #TrainedPerception #TidesOfKnowing
